title: eval_*_test allocates Vec<&Form> to call extract_* helpers
description: eval_header_test, eval_address_test, and eval_envelope_test each allocate an intermediate Vec<&Form> (via forms.iter().collect()) solely to satisfy extract_match_type, extract_comparator, and extract_address_part which take &[&Form]. These helpers could instead take &[Form] directly (iterating over references internally), eliminating one Vec allocation per test evaluation. As-is this creates three short-lived heap allocations on every single test evaluation, which compounds in scripts with many header tests.
